channel.title: Jhony Kaesemodel Pontes on Jhony Kaesemodel Pontes
channel.description: Recent content in Jhony Kaesemodel Pontes on Jhony Kaesemodel Pontes

item.description: “Most of us take completely for granted our ability to see the world around us. How do we do it seems no great mystery. We just open our eyes and look! When we do, we perceive a complex array of meaningful objects located in three-dimensional space” - Stephen E. Palmer, Vision Science: Photons to Phenomenology.

item.title: Two-stage facial age prediction using group-specific features
A flexible hierarchical approach for facial age estimation based on multiple features
